subcodes.first_line: Hearken unto that which is revealed unto thee from the precincts of grandeur and power, the seat of thy Lord, the Mighty, the Chosen One. Verily, He [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان استمع ما یوحی الیک من شطر العظمه و الاقتدار مقر ربک العزیز المختار انه لا
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @justice and wrath of God, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
